name: Flife
short_description: Flife, the title of my game, holds a dual significance. Initially, it combines 'Flip' and 'Knife,' reflecting its origins. However, it delves deeper by merging 'F' and 'life,' symbolizing the concept that life can be fantastic as long as you persist and refuse to give up.
detailed_description:
Flife is more than just a game title; it encapsulates the fusion of 'Flip' and 'Knife' in its original meaning, but it also carries a profound message. When you combine 'F' and 'life,' it becomes a testament to the idea that as long as you persevere and keep trying, life can truly be fantastic. This is the profound experience I aim for players to immerse themselves in as they journey towards the conclusion of my game.

Experience the challenge of climbing with a knife all the way to the top!

Flip your favorite knife to climb up dynamic landscapes.

■ Flip your knife all the way to the top.
■ Millions of different knife customizations!
■ There is no save point.
■ Don't give up!
